go.name: golang.org/x/crypto
go.justification: Transitive dependency of github.com/cloudflare/circl (declared); circl builds on x/crypto primitives. Not imported directly by the SDK.

go.name: golang.org/x/sys
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/libc / modernc.org/sqlite (declared); provides low-level syscall primitives. Not imported directly by the SDK.

go.name: modernc.org/libc
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared); the pure-Go libc shim sqlite is compiled against.

go.name: modernc.org/mathutil
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared) via modernc.org/libc.

go.name: modernc.org/memory
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared) via modernc.org/libc; arena allocator used by the pure-Go sqlite runtime.

go.name: github.com/dustin/go-humanize
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared) via modernc.org/libc.

go.name: github.com/mattn/go-isatty
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared) via modernc.org/libc; terminal detection.

go.name: github.com/ncruces/go-strftime
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared); strftime formatting for sqlite date functions.

go.name: github.com/remyoudompheng/bigfft
go.justification: Transitive dependency of modernc.org/sqlite (declared) via modernc.org/mathutil; big-integer FFT multiplication.

go.name: gopkg.in/yaml.v3
go.justification: Transitive dependency of github.com/agent-receipts/ar/daemon (declared in-repo module); used by the daemon's config handling.

py.name: cffi
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of cryptography (declared); cryptography's C bindings are built on cffi (on non-PyPy platforms).

py.name: pycparser
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of cryptography via cffi; cffi uses pycparser to parse C declarations.

py.name: pydantic-core
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of pydantic (declared); the compiled validation core pydantic v2 is built on.

py.name: annotated-types
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of pydantic (declared); provides the constraint types pydantic re-exports.

py.name: typing-extensions
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of pydantic (declared); backports typing features for the supported Python range.

py.name: typing-inspection
py.justification: Transitive runtime dependency of pydantic (declared); pydantic uses it to introspect type annotations at runtime.
